name: Autumn Barley Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, chopped into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place barley and water in a large pot. Bring to a boil.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except the tomatoes.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for about 50 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes. Cook an additional 10 minutes.
5. Serve hot. Can be prepared in a slow cooker, but do not add the tomatoes until just before serving.
